content:
It looks like you're using brave browser.

There's a bug report I've found for another app stating that 'Brave Shield' is blocking oAuth flow for their app. See this github report. https://github.com/appwrite/appwrite/issues/9292

Possibly your experiencing the same issue with TBA. Can you try temporarily disabling 'Brave Shield' if applicable. I'm not familiar with Brave browsers features.

You could also try setting a different default browser and see if the issue continues.
creator: platform34

content: @Platform34, thank you for the quick response! I tried what you said, it did not help. I also tried setting Firefox and Chromium as default browsers, but that also did not help. For what it's worth, the photos that you see with the Brave icon are within the TBA app-window. Is it possible that TBA jumped over to borrow a browser just to do the OAuth check? And if so, it picked Brave for the task every time (even when the other browsers were made to be default).
creator: maguster

content:
The app normally displays pages using webview. Do you have the 'Android system webview' app installed and up to date?

It's also possible that Brave is set as the default handler for web links. You could try clearing Brave as the default link handlers (if set) and see if that helps. Opening links will then display a popup asking which browser to use or set as default.

  1. Goto android settings > apps > Brave
  2. Tap open by default
  3. Clear default

The location of the setting may be slightly different depending on Android version and phone manufacturer.
creator: platform34

content:
Have you checked if the emails are found within your trash / deleted mail folder?

Did you delete the email(s) on your desktop client? Doing so would normally move them from inbox to the trash folder on the server. The mobile app would reflect this after synchronization.

To see deleted mails in the mobile app, you may need to enable sync on the folder.

  1. Open the side bar showing your account folders
  2. Tap manage folders (bottom of list)
  3. Tap your trash/deleted folder
  4. Toggle 'Enable Sync' ON
creator: platform34
